coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your friends are posting their VO2max workouts on Strava. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep — settle into 140% quickly. Don't overshoot the first 30 seconds.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1 of 5 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where average athletes quit. You're not average. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your competition is resting. You're getting faster. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in. Find your breathing. Trust your fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/5. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 5/5 — hold 140% FTP at 85-100 rpm. Seated. 0s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 41 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 5: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
